title: Resolve docs merge conflict and merge
description: The docs-mover branch (overstory/docs-mover/S3Vector-3d0e) has a trivial conflict on .mulch/mulch.config.yaml. Resolve it: the architecture domain needs to be in the domains list. Merge the branch to current branch. Also archive/delete streamlit frontend branches content - move any streamlit-specific code to archive/streamlit-frontend/.
closeReason: Merged docs-mover branch resolving mulch config conflict (all 4 domains preserved). Archived 28 streamlit frontend files from streamlit-frontend branches to archive/streamlit-frontend/.

title: PLAN: Architecture review & redesign for multi-modal benchmark+demo platform
description: Full architecture review of current S3Vector/VideoLake codebase. Produce a comprehensive architecture plan (docs/plans/ARCHITECTURE_PLAN.md) covering: 1) Clean service architecture (consolidate dual FastAPI layers, remove dead code) 2) Multi-modal support (text, image, audio, video datasets — not just video) 3) Plugin/provider pattern for embedding models 4) Plugin/provider pattern for vector stores 5) UX for deploying/selecting infrastructure components 6) API design for benchmark execution and results. Reference findings from exploration agents. The plan must be actionable with clear file-level changes.
closeReason: Architecture review and comprehensive plan completed. Spec written with consolidation strategy for FastAPI layers, provider patterns, multi-modal support, and 6-week implementation roadmap.

title: PLAN: Research Bedrock embedding models & 3rd party options
description: Research ALL embedding models available through AWS Bedrock, SageMaker, and Bedrock Marketplace. Produce a comprehensive plan (docs/plans/EMBEDDING_MODELS_PLAN.md) covering: 1) All Bedrock-native embedding models (Titan, Cohere, etc.) with capabilities (text/image/video/audio/multimodal) 2) Bedrock Marketplace models (Qwen embeddings, Voyager embeddings, etc.) 3) SageMaker-hosted 3rd party models 4) Non-AWS models to consider (Gemini embedding, OpenAI embeddings, etc.) 5) How to integrate each — API patterns, invocation, cost 6) Provider abstraction design for easy model swapping. Use web search and AWS docs.

title: PLAN: React frontend UX/UI redesign for deployment & benchmarking
description: Design a modern, polished React frontend UX plan (docs/plans/FRONTEND_PLAN.md) for the benchmark+demo platform. Cover: 1) Deployment wizard UX — select embedding models, vector stores, compute configs with clear cost estimates 2) Benchmark configuration & execution UI 3) Results dashboard with comparison charts, latency graphs, cost analysis 4) Multi-modal demo interface (search across text/image/audio/video) 5) Infrastructure status & management panel 6) Component architecture, state management, routing. Reference existing React code on this branch. Should feel like a polished AWS demo, not a prototype.

title: PLAN: Terraform infrastructure for configurable multi-backend deployments
description: Design Terraform infrastructure plan (docs/plans/INFRASTRUCTURE_PLAN.md) for supporting configurable deployments of: 1) Multiple embedding model providers (Bedrock native, Marketplace, SageMaker endpoints) 2) Multiple vector stores (S3 Vectors, OpenSearch, Qdrant, LanceDB, pgvector/Aurora, etc.) 3) Multiple dataset types (text, image, audio, video) with sample data 4) Benchmark runner infrastructure 5) Ingestion pipeline adaptable to different modalities 6) Cost estimation module for each configuration. Build on existing Terraform modules but redesign for clean composability.

title: PLAN: Code cleanup — remove dead code, consolidate layers, fix security
description: Produce a cleanup plan (docs/plans/CLEANUP_PLAN.md) based on backend-explorer findings: 1) Remove 10+ identified dead code files 2) Consolidate dual FastAPI layers (src/api/ vs src/backend/) into single layer 3) Consolidate dual config systems 4) Add API authentication 5) Fix CORS configuration 6) Fix async anti-pattern in health check 7) Clean up empty src/models/ 8) Archive Streamlit frontend code. List every file to delete, merge, or modify.
